description: Goal: remove lossy compression between artifact truth and native handoff. Replace closure-constructor candidate body vectors and block-local closure-call target side tables with first-class callable boundary references and explicit exact-target closure-call facts. Lowering should preserve direct singleton closure-call resolution separately from opaque higher-order closure values. Acceptance: compiler2 backend/native lowering tests show closure-producing values reference callable boundaries, closure-call sites carry direct-vs-opaque facts explicitly, and NativeBody no longer publishes constructor candidate body ids or ambient closure-call target lookup tables.
title: Preserve callable boundary facts through compiler2 backend and native lowering
